pi_items.source: Docker Hub API query for library/python tags (https://hub.docker.com/v2/repositories/library/python/tags/3.11-slim)
Concatenation of verified image and tag

privileged_info_summary: The task requires pulling the official Python Docker image with the tag '3.11-slim' from Docker Hub. The existence of the 'python' repository and the '3.11-slim' tag has been verified via Docker Hub's public registry.
